## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new GrowthX dashboard and discuss upcoming team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Dashboard Walkthrough:** Nate requested a walkthrough of the new Looker Studio dashboard to understand key performance indicators (KPIs) and attribute growth.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:** Non-branded search and LLM traffic are the primary indicators of GrowthX's impact, as they show performance for non-brand-specific queries.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Team Restructuring:** GrowthX is restructuring in December, moving Jacob to a strategic, non-customer-facing role to add more strategic depth to the team.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:** GrowthX is out Nov 27–29 (Thanksgiving); deliverables are front-loaded, and the next sync is the week of Dec 2.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

## Topics

### Dashboard Walkthrough Request

  - [Nate requested a walkthrough of the new Looker Studio dashboard to understand its metrics and attribute growth.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [**Goal:** Quantify GrowthX's monthly impact and attribute specific growth to their work.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

### Key Dashboard Metrics

  - [**Non-branded Search:** Traffic from non-brand-specific Google queries.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [**Significance:** The best indicator of GrowthX's direct impact, as it shows performance for queries not already targeting "Teero."](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** Traffic from large language models (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [**Significance:** Now accounts for \~50% of non-branded traffic, making it a critical metric.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [**Engagement Rate:** Measures user activity beyond a page visit (e.g., clicking links).](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Significance:** A 53% engagement rate on LLM traffic is a strong signal of content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**Sessions:** A user visit ending after 30 minutes of inactivity.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [**Conversion Events:** Jessalynn noted a tracking error (29k "office open" events is too high) and will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

### Team Restructuring & Holiday Schedule

  - [**Team Changes (Effective Dec):**](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [GrowthX is restructuring to add more strategic depth.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [Jacob is moving to a strategic, behind-the-scenes role.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [Rachel will remain the primary content contact.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [New strategic roles may join calls; GrowthX will provide details as they are finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [GrowthX team is out Nov 27–29 (Wednesday–Friday) for Thanksgiving.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [Deliverables are front-loaded to ensure no impact.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [The next sync is the week of Dec 2.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jessalynn:** Schedule a dashboard walkthrough with Jacob for the week of Dec 2.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [**Nate:** Review the PSEO recommendations sent by Jacob.](https://fathom.video/share/W1aW2eDmHQzRR2GkpBwmzJDUMXMR1zVJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
